channel.title: Enterprise Settings on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Enterprise Settings on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Enterprise-managed OpenTelemetry export for VS Code and CLI
item.description:
GitHub Copilot now supports enterprise-managed OpenTelemetry export for VS Code and CLI, letting organizations direct telemetry to an approved collector centrally instead of requiring developers to set OTEL_* environment variables. The configuration is delivered through enterprise-managed settings.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Enterprise managed-settings.json is generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Cloud now supports AI standards configuration through a managed-settings.json file stored in a .github-private repository within a selected organization. This gives enterprises a centralized way to define governance and related settings.

  • Source: GitHub
